description: Baseline: 64 tests, all passing

Add mix npm.update, mix npm.run (scripts), read_scripts in PackageJSON
Add mix npm.info, mix npm.why, peerDependencies warnings, optionalDependencies parsing, pruning + bin integration tests
Add mix npm.cache, mix npm.exec, mix npm.init tasks; more round-trip and integration tests
Add mix npm.clean, directories.bin support, hoist/tarball/lockfile edge case tests
Add overrides, engines/bin registry parsing, mix npm.clean, peerDeps/engines integration tests

Add custom registry URL, auth tokens, retry logic with backoff, 401/403 handling
Add mix npm.tree, npm.search, complex JSON/lockfile tests, scalability test

Update README, CHANGELOG for v0.4.0, add deprecated package integration test, dist metadata test

Add workspaces support (read_workspaces, expand_workspaces with glob patterns)

Split monolith npm_test.exs into 33 per-module test files, add NPM.PeerDeps module, port 193 canonical tests from npm/node-semver fixtures (range-include, range-exclude, comparisons)
Port npm/node-semver version-gt-range, version-lt-range, valid-versions, equality, and increment fixtures — 153 additional canonical tests
Remove ported npm_semver tests (testing our dependency is pointless — it has its own suite). Keep only tests of npm_ex code. 978 real tests.
Add NPM module top-level API tests, frozen install lockfile matching tests, lockfile roundtrip integrity tests with deps preservation
Add NPM.Dedupe module (find_duplicates, best_shared_version, savings_estimate, summary) with 12 tests, NPM top-level API tests, fix warnings in peer_deps/hooks/lifecycle/tarball/integration tests
Fix flaky cache tests (async: false for env var tests), fix unused variable warnings, add dedupe many-duplicates test — 1000 real tests
Add NPM.Workspace module (discover, names, dep_graph, build_order, workspace_root?) with 12 tests including topological sort and diamond dependency handling
Add NPM.Outdated module (check, filter_by_type, format_entry, summary) with 10 tests for detecting major/minor/patch updates, filtering, and formatting
Add NPM.Audit module (check, fixable?, filter_by_severity, summary, format_finding, compare_severity) with 16 tests for security advisory matching and severity filtering
Add NPM.Why module (explain, direct?, dependents, format_reasons) with 13 tests for dependency path tracing, direct vs transitive detection, formatting
Add NPM.Diff module (compare_files, file_hashes, summary, format_changes) with 16 tests for file-level package version diffing
Add NPM.Fund module (extract, collect, group_by_url, summary) with 11 tests for funding URL discovery from string/map/list formats and node_modules scanning
Add NPM.License module (extract, scan, permissive?, non_permissive, group_by_license, summary, check_policy) with 21 tests for license compliance scanning
NPM.Prune Credo nesting issues in check_scoped and dir_size
Add NPM.Prune module (find_extraneous, prune!, dry_run, extraneous_size) with 9 tests for removing packages not in lockfile including scoped packages
Add NPM.Size module (analyze, top, total_size, total_files, format_size, summary) with 14 tests for install size analysis including scoped packages
Add NPM.Pack module (list_files, tarball_name, excluded?, always_included?, default_files) with 21 tests for npm pack file selection and tarball naming
Add NPM.Shrinkwrap module (create, exists?, read, verify, outdated?, remove) with 16 tests for lockfile freezing and verification
Add NPM.DepCheck module (check, extract_imports, normalize_package_name, scan_imports) with 21 tests for detecting unused/missing deps via require/import scanning
Add NPM.BinResolver dedicated tests (11), NPM.Compiler tests (2), fix _name warning in Why module — 1193 tests total

Add 36 edge case tests across 11 modules: scoped packages in Outdated, multiple advisories in Audit, single/empty workspace, deep chains in Why, mixed Diff changes, Fund/License/Pack/Size/Shrinkwrap/DepCheck edge cases
Add NPM.Deprecation module (check, extract, deprecated?, format_warning, scan) with 15 tests for deprecation notice detection including scoped packages
Add NPM.Tree module (build, format, flatten, max_depth, count, filter) with 19 tests for dependency tree rendering, circular dep detection, and pattern filtering
Add NPM.Search module (search, score, filter_by_score) with 12 tests for local package search by name/description/keywords with relevance scoring
Add NPM.Stats module (compute, version_distribution, connectivity, most_depended) with 15 tests for project dependency statistics and graph analysis
Add NPM.Overrides module (parse, apply_overrides, matching, validate, format_override) with 13 tests for package version override handling
Add NPM.Verify module (check, clean?, summary, format_issue) with 11 tests for verifying installed packages match lockfile — detects missing, mismatched, extraneous
Fix 2 ex_dna clones: extract Lockfile.parse_packages/1 (reused in npm.diff task), extract print_dep_section in npm.list task. Add ex_dna to quality gate. Add NPM.Verify module with 11 tests.
Add NPM.Scripts module (read, list, has?, hooks_for, categorize, filter, format, execution_order) with 20 tests for npm run script management
Add NPM.Token module (read, configured?, mask, valid_format?, auth_header, parse_npmrc) with 16 tests for auth token management and .npmrc parsing
Add NPM.Publish (check, check_required, check_recommended, version_exists?, name_available?, summary) with 16 tests and NPM.Token module — 1366 tests total
Add NPM.Init module (generate, write, exists?, default_name, default_scripts, generate_minimal, from_mix_project) with 13 tests for package.json generation
Add NPM.Doctor module (diagnose, healthy?, format_results, summary) with 9 tests for project health checks — validates package.json, lockfile, node_modules, gitignore
Add NPM.Link module (link, unlink, list, linked?) with 10 tests for local package symlink management including scoped packages
Add NPM.CI module (validate, preflight, needs_clean?, format_errors) with 10 tests for strict frozen install validation in CI environments
Add 4 tests for Lockfile.parse_packages/1 covering raw map parsing, missing field defaults, empty input, and multiple packages
Add NPM.Completion module (commands, complete, complete_packages, complete_scripts, bash_completions) with 9 tests for shell completion support
Add NPM.Resolutions module (parse, matches?, resolve, apply_resolutions) with 13 tests for yarn-style resolution pinning
Add NPM.Import module (detect, from_package_lock, migration_needed?, primary_manager) with 14 tests for lockfile migration from npm/yarn/pnpm/bun
Add NPM.EngineCheck module (check_all, check_package, unsatisfied, format_issues) with 13 tests for engine compatibility checking across installed packages
